summary: All build checks pass. Backend ruff lint reports no errors. Frontend Next.js build succeeds with all 13 routes built successfully (11 static, 2 dynamic). Frontend lint reports 15 warnings and 0 errors. TypeScript type check is clean. No new large dependencies added in this sprint.

checks.detail: ruff check app/ — All checks passed

checks.detail: npm run build succeeded. 13 routes built (11 static, 2 dynamic). No build errors.

checks.name: Frontend lint
checks.detail: 15 warnings, 0 errors. Warnings are pre-existing (unused eslint-disable directive, unused vi import in tests).

checks.name: TypeScript type check
checks.detail: tsc --noEmit passes cleanly for all new and modified TypeScript files.

checks.name: Bundle size
checks.detail: No new large dependencies added. @tanstack/react-query and axios updates are minor version bumps. New analytics section components are code-split by Next.js automatically.
